hero.headline: You already know you should be using AI. The problem is nobody knows where to start
hero.headlineHighlight: The problem is nobody knows where to start.
hero.sub: We train professionals and teams to use AI in their real work — in their language, with their context, without a single line of code.

problems.title: You're not the only one stuck here

items.title: Everyone's talking about AI but nobody actually knows how to use it well
items.desc: The tools are there. The pressure is real. But between the noise, the options, and the day-to-day, nobody knows where to start.

items.title: You've tried tools that got abandoned after a week
items.desc: Not because they were bad. Nobody understood them well enough to make them stick.

items.title: Every explanation has so much jargon you end up more confused than before
items.desc: AI doesn't have to be a programming project. You just need someone to explain it in your language, applied to your actual work.

tiers.label: For You
tiers.name: Squai One
tiers.partnership: For professionals coming in on their own, either with a specific problem they want to solve or wanting to learn AI from scratch.
items: Free diagnostic call before committing to anything
Hourly consulting if you already know what to solve, or a 20-hour training package for $1,900,000 COP if you want to learn AI from scratch
tiers.priceNote: Or a training package for $1,900,000 COP

tiers.label: For Groups
tiers.name: Squai Grow
tiers.partnership: For two or more people who want to learn or train together in AI, whether a group of friends or a work team.
items: Free diagnostic call and a proposal within 48 hours
Per-person discount that grows with group size
Program sized to your group's needs
Virtual or in-person sessions in select cities
tiers.priceNote: Price per person. The bigger the group, the better the rate.

tiers.label: Tailored Training
tiers.name: Squai Learn
tiers.partnership: For schools and universities that want to train their students or community in AI.
items: Content adapted to your audience: students, teachers, or parents
Virtual or in-person format in select cities
tiers.priceNote: Contact us to define the format for your institution.

howItWorks.title: How It Works

steps.name: Diagnostic Call
steps.description: A free call to understand how you work and recommend the right service.

steps.name: Proposal in 48 hours
steps.description: You receive a clear proposal in under 48 hours: scope, sessions, deliverables, and investment.

steps.name: Kickoff
steps.description: We align on schedule, format, and expectations. We start on your terms, virtual or in person.

steps.name: We work with your real case
steps.description: Our work is based on your actual needs, not generic examples.

steps.name: You walk away with something usable from day one
steps.description: Tools, processes, or a project you can use immediately, not just theory.

steps.name: Keep growing with Squai
steps.description: When you're ready for the next step, we help you see what other areas AI can add value to in your work or your team.

howItWorks.subtitle: A clear process, no unnecessary steps, so AI becomes part of your work and stays there.

items.title: No jargon, no code
items.desc: We teach AI in plain language. You just need to know your work — we take it from there.

items.title: Applied to your real work, not to demos
items.desc: Every session uses examples from your role and your context. What you learn on Tuesday you can use on Wednesday.

items.title: Mentors with real experience
items.desc: We assign people who have applied AI in professional settings, with real judgment.

items.title: You leave with tools, not dependency
items.desc: The goal is for you to finish with the tools and confidence to keep applying AI on your own.

squad.title: Meet the Squad
squad.sub: Our mentors come from areas like operations, data, processes, and security — all with real experience using AI in their own work. We don't teach theory. We teach what we've already tested ourselves first.

members.desc: AI gives me the speed of analysis a business strategy needs today.
With AI, I build in days what used to take months of development.
Before automating blindly, I use AI to redesign the process first.
With AI, no new hire feels lost in their first week.
What used to take days of analysis, I now answer in minutes with AI.
I catch a risk before it becomes an incident, thanks to AI.

contactModal.title: Book your free call and tell us more about you
contactModal.description: Write to us or book a free call. No long forms, no waiting.
contactModal.descriptionPlaceholder: Tell us briefly what you want to improve with AI in your work…
contactModal.successMessage: Thanks for reaching out, talk soon!
contactModal.errorSlotTaken: This time slot is no longer available. Please choose another.
contactModal.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
contactModal.errorRescheduleForbidden: This reschedule link does not match your email.
contactModal.stepDetailsDesc: Almost there, tell us about you
contactModal.noSlots: No available slots for this date. Please choose another day.
contactModal.privacyRequired: You must accept the privacy policy
contactModal.privacySuffix: . Your data is used solely to respond to your inquiry.

ctaSection.headline: Take the first step without committing to anything
ctaSection.sub: A free call to understand where you are and which service makes sense for you. No pressure, no sales pitch.

sections.heading: Who we are
sections.body: Squai is responsible for processing the personal data collected through this website. If you have any questions, you can reach us at team@squai.io

sections.heading: What data we collect
sections.body: When you use our contact form, we collect your name, email address, and the message you write. We do not collect any other personal data.

sections.heading: Why we collect it
sections.body: We use your data solely to respond to your inquiry. We will not use it for marketing, profiling, or any other purpose.

sections.heading: Third parties
sections.body: To deliver our response to you, we use Resend as our email-sending service. Your data may be processed by this provider in accordance with their own privacy policy. We do not share your data with anyone else.

sections.heading: How long we keep your data
sections.body: We keep your data for up to 1 year after your inquiry. After that period, it is permanently deleted.

sections.heading: Your rights
sections.body: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data at any time. You can also withdraw your consent. These rights apply regardless of where you are located.

sections.heading: How to exercise your rights
sections.body: To exercise any of these rights, send us an email at team@squai.io. We will respond within 30 days.

footer.tagline: You already know you should be using AI. The problem is nobody knows where to start.

rescheduleResume.message: You closed your reschedule flow. You can continue whenever you want.

schedule.heading: Your Squai session is confirmed!
schedule.greeting: Hey {{name}}, see you soon. In this call we'll learn how you work today and figure out together where to start with AI.
schedule.problemQuestion: Your answer to "How can we help you?":
schedule.rescheduleText: If something comes up, no worries. You can find a better time by clicking {{cta}}.
